hypothesis: If the o4-mini model is prompted with a one-shot prompt using the most complex in-context example, then the extraction of synthesis procedures into PROV-DM graphs from scientific papers will exhibit higher collection rate and higher precision, recall, and F1-score at both structural and parametric levels than when using zero-shot prompting or other models, because the complex example better grounds the model in PROV-DM structure and procedure semantics.
